name: thincart-app
description: ThinCart — native mobile wrapper (Capacitor) that bundles the PWA and hits a remote ThinCart API.

scripts.copy-web: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp -R ../app/. www/ && cp api-base.js www/api-base.js
scripts.build:android: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.open:ios: npm run sync && cap open ios
